Pendants Collection

Meteorite Pendants

Wear a slice of the cosmos around your neck — meteorite pendants hand-cut from authentic Gibeon iron, etched to reveal the ancient crystal structure within.

45 pieces
Secure Checkout SSL encrypted via Shopify
Free Laser Engraving Up to 25 characters, choice of fonts
Authentic Materials Certified Gibeon meteorite
Happy Customers Thousands of rings made
Handmade in USA Every piece, by hand
30-Day Returns In-store credit issued

Jewelry by Johan
Gibeon Meteorite

Yellow Star Necklace, Meteorite Pendant

View at Johan

A meteorite pendant brings 4.5 billion years of cosmic history to one of the most personal pieces of jewelry a person can wear. Gibeon meteorite pendants are typically cut as polished slices — thin cross-sections through the iron mass that expose the full width of the Widmanstätten crystal pattern in a single plane. The result looks almost architectural: geometric bands of kamacite and taenite crystal arranged in patterns that formed before Earth existed.

Johan crafts each pendant by hand in Minneapolis, selecting meteorite slices for strong pattern expression and minimal inclusions. Pendants are available in a range of sizes and forms, paired with different chain lengths and metal settings depending on the design. Every piece of Gibeon used is from pre-2004 inventory — legally acquired before Namibia's national monument designation closed new collection.

The Stardust collection offers a distinct alternative for those who want meteorite's cosmic character in a hypoallergenic format: genuine meteorite pieces and shavings are suspended in resin and set into the pendant face, creating a jewel-like expression of the same material. Both approaches use authentic Gibeon meteorite — the difference is form, not authenticity.

Gibeon meteorite is iron-based and requires proper sealing for daily wear. All Johan meteorite pendants are sealed at the workshop and backed by the same lifetime cleaning and re-etching service that covers every other piece in the collection. Orders and customization are handled on Jewelry by Johan.
